ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pollution_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollution data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of pollutant */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "ces_value" REAL /* Value of CES pollutant */,
  "mer_value" REAL /* Value of MER pollutant */,
  "ped_value" REAL /* Value of PED pollutant */,
  "tla_value" REAL /* Value of TLA pollutant */,
  "xal_value" REAL /* Value of XAL pollutant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the monitoring station */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of measurement */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_data_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the pollutant */,
  "health_impact" TEXT /* Health impact of the pollutant */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the pollutant */,
  "regulatory_limit" REAL /* Regulatory limit for the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's central point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's central point */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "industrial_activity" TEXT /* Level of industrial activity in the region */,
  "traffic_density" TEXT /* Traffic density in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_regions" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station-region association */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "distance_from_city_center" REAL /* Distance from the city center */,
  "nearest_road" TEXT /* Nearest major road to the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_regions_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollution data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pollution_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollution data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pollution_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollution data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versioning_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pollution_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollution data entry that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_date" TEXT /* Date when the alarm was triggered */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g., high CES, high MER) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that was exceeded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the alarm */,
  "alert_sent_to" TEXT /* Email or phone number where the alert was sent */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES pollution_data ("data_id")
)
